hooks.statusMessage: Mise à jour de la version…
hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'FastLearn/index\.html' || exit 0; CURRENT=$(grep -oP 'burger-version">v\K[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$CURRENT" ] && exit 0; MAJOR=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f1); MINOR=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f2); PATCH=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f3); NEW="$MAJOR.$MINOR.$((PATCH+1))"; sed -i "s/burger-version\">v${CURRENT}/burger-version\">v${NEW}/g" "$FILE"; sed -i "s/FastLearn v${CURRENT}/FastLearn v${NEW}/g" "$FILE"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Version auto-bump: v${CURRENT} → v${NEW}\"}"
